race.comment: TOO DARN SASSY (16) progressed nicely back in trip with a fast finishing third over 1200m at Canberra in a solid rating contest. A repeat effort will see her take holding out over the extra trip. SPIELE (12) tough old mare who will relish the 3kg claim after shouldering the big weights this time in. Can race a little closer from the draw and has a strong record over this track and trip. SABLONNEUSE (11) progressive gelding heading in the right direction. Resumed with a tough first-up win at this track, then up quickly in class with a tiring seventh over 1400m in the Canberra Guineas Preview. Can bounce back in this weaker race. Each-way. COSSACK WARRIOR (1) returns from a let-up from the good gate. Stays in the mix off the good second at Wagga on January 26.
